action: Persist Ghosh 2026 self-correcting pipelines article + gap analysis to knowledge-base/research/ as canonical reference for c41-c44 adoptions
operator_note: Foundation cycle for the Ghosh adoption series. Scope (1 file, ~180 LoC): create knowledge-base/research/self-correcting-pipelines-ghosh-2026.md following the convention from existing dossiers (tsc-prompt-compression-2026.md). Sections: (1) Archive note + source URL https://medium.com/@sohamghosh_23912/self-correcting-multi-agent-ai-systems-building-pipelines-that-fix-themselves-010786bae2db (Soham Ghosh, Feb 28, 2026); (2) Ghosh's thesis verbatim quote + 1-sentence paraphrase; (3) Eight patterns Ghosh names with [✓ have it]/[GAP] annotations; (4) Convergence map (his pattern → our file:line); (5) Four gap-analysis adoptions (c41 score caps, c42 tool sanitization, c43 best-attempt, c44 append-only) with rationale; (6) Where evolve-loop goes beyond Ghosh (7 dimensions: stall watchdog c33, idempotency-via-git c37, SHA-chain integrity, kernel hooks, multi-project hash, mutation testing, inbox-injection c32); (7) Where we deliberately depart from Ghosh (8-row table); (8) Citation discipline pointer. ZERO code changes — pure research artifact. Citation rule: future ADRs/dossiers cite this file path, NOT the Medium URL (survives URL rot). Per feedback_knowledge_base_stewardship.md: knowledge-base/research/ is excluded from agent context by default. Builder must follow doc-stewardship doc/ vs knowledge-base/ split.
